2606.10934.title: WorldKernel: A World Model is the Coupling Kernel of Admissible Possible Worlds
2606.10934.paper_summary: A common assumption holds that enough observational and interventional data, given to a strong enough predictor, suffices. We report a failure mode that contradicts it. Across hundreds of structural causal models, on identified quantities a strong predictor and a Bayesian baseline both succeed, but on unidentified quantities (the couplings between counterfactual worlds) the predictor collapses to a point, on 28% of models to one no valid model can produce, while the truth is an admissible interval more data never narrows. The gap is structural: prediction cannot represent uncertainty over counterfactual couplings. We cast a world model as a single positive semidefinite coupling kernel K(T,T') over admissible worlds, whose diagonal is the ordinary posterior (what a predictor recovers) and whose off-diagonal is the cross-world coupling it cannot, which every counterfactual reads. The paper is the theory of that off-diagonal. It is real: two states with identical posteriors differ on a cross-world query, and the off-diagonal is the coupling that fixes counterfactuals. It can be bounded: positive semidefiniteness is partial-identifying information the marginals lack, and enforcing it bounds counterfactuals in polynomial time where the exact response-type program is intractable. Logical structure sharpens it: ontology axioms tighten the bound by up to a third, propagating to couplings they never touch. It can be acquired: targeted scars, constraints learned from encountered infeasibilities, close the gap several times faster than untargeted ones. Its full reconstruction is approximate counting of the admissible worlds, tractable below the Sly-Sun threshold and inapproximable above; we do not claim to beat the worst case.
2606.10934.paper_summary_zh: 一個常見的假設認為，足夠的觀察和干預數據，給予一個強大的預測因子，就足夠了。我們報告了一種與之相矛盾的失效模式。在數百個結構因果模型中，對於已識別的量，強預測因子和貝葉斯基準都成功，但對於未識別的量（反事實世界之間的耦合），預測因子崩潰到一個點，在28%的模型中，崩潰到一個沒有有效模型能產生的點，而真相是一個可接受的區間，更多數據從未縮小。這個差距是結構性的：預測無法表示對反事實耦合的不確定性。我們將世界模型表述為一個在可接受世界上單一的正半定耦合核 K(T,T')，其對角線是普通的後驗（預測因子恢復的內容），而其非對角線是它無法讀取的跨世界耦合，每個反事實都能讀取。這篇論文是該非對角線的理論。它是真實的：兩個具有相同後驗的狀態在跨世界查詢中有所不同，而非對角線是固定反事實的耦合。它可以被界定：正半定性是邊際缺乏的部分識別信息，強制執行它在多項式時間內界定反事實，而精確的響應類型程序是不可處理的。邏輯結構使其更加明確：本體公理將界限收緊了三分之一，並傳播到它們從未接觸的耦合。它可以被獲得：針對性的傷痕，從遇到的不可行性中學到的約束，比未針對的約束關閉差距的速度快幾倍。其完整重建是對可接受世界的近似計數，在 Sly-Sun 閾值以下是可處理的，而在其上則是不可近似的；我們不聲稱能擊敗最壞情況。
2606.10934.author: Fabio Rovai et.al.
